name: Grace of the Goddess
explicitMods: 377% increased Physical Damage
Gain 47% of Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Gain 57% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Gain 54% of Physical Damage as Extra Lightning Damage

+1 to maximum number of Sacred Wisps
+1 to number of Sacred Wisps Summoned
flavourText: In a time of darkness, know that the Draíocht will bring you light.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Spends a portion of your mana to grant a buff that takes some of the damage from hits for you until depleted. The buff grants added lightning damage based on the amount of mana spent by this skill. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: Base duration is 3.00 seconds
Spends 64% of current Mana

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to Mana Spent by this Skill's effect
Buff grants Added Lightning Damage equal to 14% of Mana Spent by this Skill's effect
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
20% increased Buff Effect
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that have a cooldown. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 50% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "The science is... incomprehensible at best. Nearest I can tell, the Arcana exhibits
a blast of wrath once it has been fully charged, and when directed at the Elder
will force it to take on the form it held before it entered our dimension."

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Cold, Travel, Blink, AoE

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving Chilled ground in an area at both ends of the teleport. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: Deals 1287 to 1931 Cold Damage
Base duration is 3.00 seconds
+0.4 metres to radius

20% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Normal or Magic Enemy in Area
100% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area
50% increased maximum travel distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Shaper's Touch
implicitMods: Curse Enemies with Enfeeble on Hit
explicitMods: 93% increased Armour and Energy Shield
+2 Accuracy Rating per 2 Intelligence
+1 Life per 4 Dexterity
+1 Mana per 4 Strength
1% increased Energy Shield per 10 Strength
2% increased Evasion Rating per 10 Intelligence
2% increased Melee Physical Damage per 10 Dexterity
flavourText: By my hand, the inert is given life.
By my hand, that which rots is reborn.
There is nothing that cannot be changed.
Nothing.

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: +64 to Strength
+66 to Dexterity
+51 to maximum Life
22% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

+53 to Intelligence

name: Lavianga's Spirit
explicitMods: 30% increased Amount Recovered
100% increased Recovery rate
Skills Cost no Mana during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "When the Ancestors fill your cup,
It is only good manners to drink your fill."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Wine of the Prophet

32% increased Charges per use
Grants a random Divination Buff for 20 seconds when Used

for those that have the will, and the way!"
- High Templar Andronicus

+71% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier
-17 to Evasion Rating

Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect have Malediction
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 10% increased Damage

descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

explicitMods: 3% chance to receive additional Abyss items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
4% chance to receive additional Divination Card items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist

+194 to maximum Energy Shield

Hex Reflection

- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

socketedItems.secDescrText: Reserves mana based on the supported spells to cause those spells to trigger when you fire projectiles from a wand attack.

socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Trigger Supported Spells when you fire Projectiles from a Non-Triggered Wand Attack
Supported Skills have 38% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate

Supported Skills have Added Spell Damage equal to 194% of Damage of Equipped Wand
If two Wands are Equipped, each contributes half as much Added Damage
Supported Skills deal 20% less Damage with Hits and Ailments
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that have no reservation. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a Tornado that hinders and repeatedly damages enemies around it. It will move forward for a duration, during which your projectiles can collide with it to deal damage as though it was an enemy. Then it will chase down enemies for a secondary duration, and reflect a portion of the damage it took from your projectiles to them in addition to its own damage.
explicitMods: Deals 414 to 620 Physical Damage
Deals Damage every 0.25 seconds
Base duration is 1.50 seconds
Base secondary duration is 4.00 seconds
During initial Duration, can be hit by your Projectiles up to 20 times
Reflects 10% of Damage Taken to Enemies
Enemies in range are Hindered
Maximum 1 Tornado
Tornado has 77% increased Movement Speed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Eyes of the Greatwolf
explicitMods: Implicit Modifier magnitudes are doubled
flavourText: I am but a vessel for a greater force.
It acts through me. Speaks through me.
Decides what lives and dies through me.
And will change the world through me.

name: Kalandra's Touch
explicitMods: Reflects opposite Ring
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Has 2 Sockets
Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
12% increased Attack Speed
+62 to maximum Life
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Immortality could grant Catarina the time necessary to shape
a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.
